title: choisya neglecta
intro: Choisya neglecta, also known as Mexican orange or mock orange, is a shrub native to Mexico and is part of the Rutaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Choisya neglecta is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
